items.title: Achieving Gold-Medal-Level Olympiad Reasoning via Simple and Unified Scaling
items.summary: Researchers have developed a method that enables AI models to achieve gold-medal-level reasoning capabilities in Olympiad-style problems through simple and unified scaling techniques.

items.title: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT for Personal Finance with Bank Account Integration
items.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new personal finance experience within ChatGPT, allowing users to connect their bank accounts for personalized financial insights and management.

items.title: Databricks Integrates GPT-5.5 for Enhanced Enterprise Agent Workflows
items.summary: Databricks is integrating OpenAI's advanced GPT-5.5 model to power sophisticated enterprise agent workflows, signaling a major step in AI adoption for business automation.

items.title: Causal Forcing++: Real-Time Interactive Video Generation with Few-Step Diffusion Distillation
items.summary: A new method, Causal Forcing++, enables scalable, real-time interactive video generation using few-step autoregressive diffusion distillation, significantly improving efficiency.

items.title: Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning Improves AI Autonomy
items.summary: New research introduces Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning, a technique that allows AI agents to learn and improve autonomously through self-distillation.

items.title: MemLens: Benchmarking Multimodal Long-Term Memory in Large Vision-Language Models
items.summary: MemLens offers a new benchmark for evaluating the long-term memory capabilities of large vision-language models across various multimodal tasks.

items.title: Silicon Valley Faces Energy Crunch as AI Demand Drives Up Prices
items.summary: Silicon Valley's energy infrastructure is under strain, requiring new providers as the escalating power demands of AI data centers significantly increase electricity prices.

items.title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer
items.summary: Researchers present SANA-WM, an efficient model capable of minute-scale world modeling using a novel hybrid linear diffusion transformer architecture.

items.title: MemEye: A Visual-Centric Evaluation Framework for Multimodal Agent Memory
items.summary: MemEye introduces a visual-centric evaluation framework designed to rigorously test and benchmark the memory capabilities of multimodal AI agents.

items.title: Darwin Family: Evolutionary Merging for Training-Free Scaling of LLM Reasoning
items.summary: The Darwin Family method proposes MRI-Trust-Weighted Evolutionary Merging to scale language model reasoning without requiring additional training.

items.title: Beyond Individual Intelligence: Surveying LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
items.summary: A comprehensive survey explores the complexities of collaboration, failure attribution, and self-evolution within multi-agent systems powered by large language models.

items.title: STALE: Can LLM Agents Know When Their Memories Are No Longer Valid?
items.summary: The STALE research investigates how LLM agents can determine the validity of their memories, addressing a critical challenge in long-term agent autonomy.

items.title: WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
items.summary: WildClawBench is introduced as a new benchmark specifically designed for evaluating AI agents in real-world, long-horizon tasks, pushing the boundaries of practical agent assessment.

items.title: Bigger AI Models Aren't Always Better: How to Choose the Right Model
items.summary: An article advises on selecting appropriate AI models, emphasizing that larger models are not universally superior and practical considerations should guide choices.

items.title: Building "Sweets Vault" - A Multimodal Gemini Agent with Physical Hardware Integration
items.summary: A project demonstrates building a multimodal Gemini agent, named "Sweets Vault," that integrates with physical hardware for real-world interactions.
